message:
fix(combinator): correct quorum_met in quorum_timeout all-done branch

The quorum_timeout's "all futures done" branch hardcoded
quorum_met: false instead of recalculating like the base quorum
function does. While this branch is unreachable in practice
(either the quorum-met or too-many-failures check catches first),
making it defensively correct keeps it consistent with the
non-timeout quorum and prevents surprises if the logic changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
